evidenceSnippetOriginal: Non-endorsed AI tools require you to sign up and create an account and the ANU cannot guarantee your security when using these tools. Currently, Copilot Enterprise is available for all ANU staff and students by signing in with an ANU account.
evidenceLocator: Section: Using AI for learning purposes
